name: Chia Seeds

pros.title: extreme fibre density
pros.explanation: Adds standout digestive and satiety value even beyond the headline nutrient display.

pros.title: can be very filling for the amount used
pros.explanation: The gel-forming fibre profile gives it practical fullness value.

pros.title: easy to add into meals
pros.explanation: Can be mixed into oats, yogurt, puddings, and smoothies without much friction.

cons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
cons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral uptake somewhat.

cons.title: texture can put some people off
cons.explanation: The gel-like texture is not universally appealing.

cons.title: usually works best with some preparation
cons.explanation: Often needs soaking or mixing into something else to shine.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
